name: Anaphylaxis Recap
subject: How much do you remember about Anaphylaxis?
preheader: Take our quiz to find out how much you remember about severe allergies

blocks.text: Anaphylaxis — how much do you remember?
It's been about 4 weeks since your Daisy First Aid class and we wanted to check in and give you a quick recap on anaphylaxis.

items: It's a severe allergic reaction with swelling of the airways
It's usually an immediate reaction and it is life threatening
You must call 999 immediately if you suspect someone is having an anaphylactic reaction
Lay the person down and raise their legs and administer their auto-adrenaline injector if they have one
Keep the person talking and monitor their breathing
If they stop breathing, begin CPR immediately

blocks.text: **We've teamed up with The Allergy Team**
The Allergy Team have some excellent resources for parents, schools & businesses on their website to help improve understanding and inclusion around allergies.
